developer.name: Aditya Bhusal
developer.title: Full-Stack Engineer · Developer Tools & AI Systems
developer.availability: Open to full-time & internship roles — available immediately

intro.valueStatement: I build developer tools and full-stack systems — from AI-powered hiring platforms to automated code-review pipelines.
intro.proofLine: Shipped Argus — a GitHub Action that auto-reviews every PR using Llama 3.3 70B, catching severity issues before they merge.

journey.title: How I got here
journey.subtitle: 3 years of building things people actually use.

milestones.title: Learned by building
milestones.description: Started with HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS — built small tools until they worked. Learned that shipping beats perfecting.

milestones.title: React, Node, databases
milestones.description: Built my first API-driven apps. Figured out auth, CRUD, state management, and why MongoDB and PostgreSQL are different tools for different problems.

milestones.title: Shipped for real users
milestones.description: Deployed School ERP to a live institution. Built HireOS with AI screening. Learned that production has problems textbooks don't cover.

milestones.title: Developer tooling & CI/CD
milestones.description: Built Argus — a GitHub Action that brings AI code review to any repo. Now I care as much about the developer experience of a tool as the end product.

finale.headline: Let's build something worth shipping.
finale.subtext: I'm a 3rd-year CS student in Bengaluru actively looking for roles where I can build real products. I move fast, I care about quality, and I respond quickly.
